sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move square at [31,12] up-left several times
# Each click moves it by (-1, -1)
# Click 4 times to move it to [27, 8]
result = action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': 12},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 30, 'col': 11},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 29, 'col': 10},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 28, 'col': 9}
])
print("Moved square 4 times:", result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nMagenta squares:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
print("\nWhite bar:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
